export_metadata.notes: Generated for App upgrade integration testing only. This is not final guidance.

known_issues: Broad firmware version applicability is unknown.
Configuration may be retained or reset; both outcomes were observed.
Post-upload manual power cycle was required in observed local runs.
Initial macOS Local Network permission denial can appear as sendto() No route to host.
Official firmware download source is identified, but firmware version applicability remains unknown.
risk_warnings: Upload completion does not mean recovery is complete. Wait about 3 minutes before judging the result.
Observed RT-AC86U runs required unplugging and reconnecting power after upload before normal recovery.
Configuration retention is not guaranteed; both retained and factory-reset-like outcomes were observed.
Do not judge failure only by ping response or by the previous LAN IP.
Use only official RT-AC86U firmware that matches the device model and verify checksums when available.
risk_and_scope.review_notes: Incoming draft from Owner-provided lab observation. Do not promote to reviewed/final without human review and artifact/source assessment. Hardware version and broad firmware applicability remain unknown.

firmware_preparation.version_selection_guidance: Use the official ASUS RT-AC86U BIOS & Firmware support page. Select firmware that explicitly matches RT-AC86U and verify the checksum when ASUS provides one.
firmware_preparation.risk_warning: Do not use firmware for another ASUS model, region, or hardware scope. This profile still does not prove broad hardware or firmware-version applicability.

macos_preflight.local_network_permission_warning: Initial macOS Local Network permission denial can appear as sendto() No route to host.

physical_setup.led_indicator: Power LED slow flashing indicates Rescue Mode; in some phases power LED may be off while LAN LED remains on.

readiness.readiness_warning: Ping and TTL can support readiness but must not be the sole success or failure signal.

transfer.client_behavior_requirement: Follow the server ACK source port. In observed RT-AC86U Rescue Mode runs, ACKs stayed on port 69, so the client continued sending to port 69.

post_upload.user_warning_after_upload: Upload completion does not mean the router is immediately reachable. Wait about 3 minutes, manually power cycle the router, set the Mac back to DHCP, then use the DHCP gateway IP as the admin URL.

known_recovery_variants: Factory-reset-like or configuration-lost state after recovery

stop_lines: Do not present this export as final production guidance.
Do not generalize RT-AC86U observations to RT-AX86U or other ASUS models.
Do not claim all hardware or firmware versions are covered.
Do not store firmware binaries or private local file paths.
Do not infer configuration retention or factory reset from transfer success.

source_trace.notes: Personal testing source; no final approval. Hardware version and broad firmware applicability are unknown.
Post-upload power-cycle requirement is an observed behavior and should be shown as a prominent warning.
Supports official firmware-source guidance only. Does not prove Rescue Mode behavior, hardware scope, broad firmware applicability, or post-upload behavior.
